title: taraxacum ensiculare
intro: Taraxacum ensiculare, also known as the lesser dandelion, is a perennial plant species within the dandelion genus Taraxacum. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects, making it a popular remedy for digestive issues and joint pain. The health benefits of Taraxacum ensiculare include its ability to support liver function, lower blood pressure, and aid in the treatment of urinary tract infections. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum ensiculare can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
